scene.message: Maki: I don't really want to{nl} be here.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Ugh, I hate this{nl} disinfectant smell...{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Bears, in a city like{nl} this...?{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: All right then,{nl} all of you...{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Hm. Let's get you{nl} treated, then.{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Mm, that should do it.{waitkey}{ret}
Right, come straight{nl} back if anything comes up.{waitkey}{ret}
